info.name: DR-COEW-001 — Community Order End Date Validation
info.description:
Manual tests for DR-COEW-001.

AC2 (a–d): requirement end date exceeds the community order end date.
AC3: order containing UPWR is shorter than 12 calendar months from the hearing date.

All requests target http://localhost:4550. Import and set the `baseUrl` variable if you need a different host.

item.name: AC2 — Requirement end date exceeds order
S06 AC2a — CUR ends after COEW order → ERROR

request.description:
COEW order ends 30-Oct-2026, CUR ends 30-Nov-2026.
Expected: 1 ERROR on off1 (AC2a — Curfew requirement).
errors.errorMessages[0] = 'The end date of the order must match or be longer than the end date of Curfew (community requirement). This affects John Smith.'

item.name: S07 AC2b — CURE endDateOfTagging after COS order → ERROR

request.description:
COS order ends 01-Dec-2026, CURE endDateOfTagging 15-Dec-2026.
Expected: 1 ERROR on off1 (AC2b — Curfew with electronic monitoring).
errors.errorMessages[0] ends with 'Jane Doe.'

item.name: S08 AC2c — CURA ends after CONI order → ERROR

request.description:
CONI order ends 01-Jan-2027, CURA ends 15-Jan-2027.
Expected: 1 ERROR on off1 (AC2c — Further curfew requirement made).
errors.errorMessages[0] ends with 'Bob Brown.'

item.name: S09 AC2d — AAR until after COEW order → ERROR

request.description:
COEW order ends 01-Jun-2027, AAR until 15-Jun-2027.
Expected: 1 ERROR on off1 (AC2d — Alcohol abstinence and monitoring).
errors.errorMessages[0] ends with 'Sarah Green.'

item.name: S10 AC2 PASS — COEW order end longer than CUR → no errors

request.description:
COEW order ends 30-Dec-2026, CUR ends 30-Nov-2026 (order is longer).
Expected: isValid=true, no errors, no warnings.

item.name: S11 — CUR + AAR both violating same order → 2 ERRORs

request.description:
COEW ends 01-Jun-2027. CUR ends 15-Jun, AAR ends 25-Jun — both exceed order.
Expected: 2 ERRORs on off1 (AC2a + AC2d), 2 errorMessages, isValid=false.

item.name: S14 AC3 — COEW + UPWR under 12 months → ERROR

request.description:
Hearing 14-May-2026, COEW ends 13-Apr-2027 (364 days — under 12 months).
Expected: 1 ERROR on off1 (AC3 — unpaid work requirement).
errors.errorMessages[0] = 'The end date of the order must be at least 12 months as it includes an unpaid work requirement. This affects John Smith.'
isValid=false.

item.name: S15 AC3 PASS — COS + UPWR exactly 12 months minus 1 day (boundary)

request.description:
Hearing 14-May-2026, COS ends 13-May-2027 (hearingDay + 12m − 1d).
Change promptValue to 2027-05-14 (exact 12m boundary) for a pass.
Expected with 2027-05-13: still triggers ERROR (under boundary).

item.name: S16 AC3 PASS — CONI + UPWR over 12 months → no errors

request.description:
Hearing 14-May-2026, CONI ends 20-May-2027 (>12 months).
Expected: isValid=true, no errors, no warnings.

item.name: Multi-defendant scenarios
item.description:
Scenarios covering multiple defendants in the same hearing, verifying:
- Each defendant's violation produces its own affectedDefendants entry
- Distinct condition templates produce separate errorMessages entries
- Same violation type shared by multiple defendants merges names into one errorMessages entry ("This affects A and B.")
- Valid defendants are not mentioned anywhere in the response

item.name: MD-01 — 4 defendants: AC2a + AC3 + AC2b + 1 valid → 3 errors, 3 errorMessages

request.description:
4 defendants in one hearing:

d1 Alice Johnson  — COEW ends 30-Oct-2026 < CUR ends 30-Nov-2026   → CUR ERROR (AC2a)
d2 Bob Williams   — COEW ends 13-Apr-2027, hearing 14-May-2026 + UPWR → UPWR ERROR (AC3)
d3 Carol Davies   — COS  ends 01-Dec-2026 < CURE tag ends 15-Dec-2026 → CURE ERROR (AC2b)
d4 David Taylor   — COEW ends 31-Dec-2027 > CUR ends 30-Nov-2026   → PASS

Expected response:
• isValid: false
• warnings: []
• errors.validationIssues: 3 entries
• errors.errorMessages: 3 separate entries (each template is distinct):
    – "...Curfew (community requirement). This affects Alice Johnson."
    – "...unpaid work requirement. This affects Bob Williams."
    – "...Curfew with electronic monitoring. This affects Carol Davies."
• d4 David Taylor must NOT appear anywhere in errors or affectedDefendants

Key paths to check:
  $.errors.validationIssues[*].affectedDefendants[*].defendantId → ["d1","d2","d3"] (any order)
  $.errors.validationIssues[*].affectedOffences[0].offenceId     → ["off1","off2","off3"] (any order)
  $.errors.errorMessages.length                                   → 3

item.name: MD-02 — 2 defendants both CUR violation → merged into 1 errorMessage with "and"

request.description:
Both d1 John Smith and d2 Jane Doe violate the same condition (AC2a — CUR exceeds order end date).
Because they share the same errorMessageTemplate, their names are merged into
a single errorMessages entry using "and" joining.

Expected response:
• isValid: false
• errors.validationIssues: 2 entries (one per defendant, each with its own affectedOffences)
• errors.errorMessages: exactly 1 entry:
    "The end date of the order must match or be longer than the end date of
     Curfew (community requirement). This affects John Smith and Jane Doe."

Key thing to check:
  $.errors.errorMessages.length === 1   (NOT 2 — same template merges names)
  $.errors.errorMessages[0] contains both "John Smith" and "Jane Doe"

item.name: MD-03 — 3 defendants: 2 UPWR violations + 1 valid → merged UPWR errorMessage

request.description:
d1 Emma Clarke  — COEW ends 13-Apr-2027 (364 days from hearing)   → UPWR ERROR (AC3)
d2 Liam Foster   — COS  ends 01-Mar-2027 (291 days from hearing)   → UPWR ERROR (AC3)
d3 Sophia Reid   — CONI ends 20-May-2027 (371 days from hearing)   → PASS (≥12 months)

Both d1 and d2 trigger the same AC3 template, so their names merge:

Expected response:
• isValid: false
• errors.validationIssues: 2 entries (d1 + d2)
• errors.errorMessages: exactly 1 entry:
    "The end date of the order must be at least 12 months as it includes an
     unpaid work requirement. This affects Emma Clarke and Liam Foster."
• d3 Sophia Reid must NOT appear in errors or affectedDefendants

Key things to check:
  $.errors.errorMessages.length === 1
  $.errors.errorMessages[0] ends with "Emma Clarke and Liam Foster."
  $.errors.validationIssues[*].affectedDefendants[*].defendantId → ["d1","d2"] only

item.name: MD-04 — 5 defendants: AC2a + AC2d + AC3 + 2 valid → 3 separate errorMessages

request.description:
5 defendants, 3 violations across 3 different conditions, 2 valid:

d1 Oliver Brown — COEW 01-Oct-2026 < CUR 01-Nov-2026         → CUR ERROR (AC2a)
d2 Isla Patel   — COEW 01-Jan-2027 < AAR until 01-Feb-2027   → AAR ERROR (AC2d)
d3 Noah Evans   — CONI 01-Apr-2027 (322 days from hearing)   → UPWR ERROR (AC3)
d4 Mia Turner   — COEW 01-Dec-2027 > CUR 01-Nov-2026         → PASS
d5 Jack Morris  — CONI 01-Jun-2027 (383 days from hearing)   → PASS

Expected response:
• isValid: false
• errors.validationIssues: 3 entries
• errors.errorMessages: 3 separate entries (each template distinct — no merging):
    – "...Curfew (community requirement). This affects Oliver Brown."
    – "...Alcohol abstinence and monitoring. This affects Isla Patel."
    – "...unpaid work requirement. This affects Noah Evans."
• d4 Mia Turner and d5 Jack Morris must NOT appear in errors or affectedDefendants

Key things to check:
  $.errors.errorMessages.length === 3
  $.errors.validationIssues[*].affectedDefendants[*].defendantId → ["d1","d2","d3"] (any order)
  "d4" and "d5" absent from $.errors
